hero.sub: Elements sells hand-tuned handpans and sound tools for players seeking depth, ritual, and presence. Insured shipping, human guidance, transparent builds.
hero.hintSound: Tap to hear a single tone (muted until you unmute)

mag.heroKicker: Your tone, kept honest in the room you play.
mag.stripLabel: Builds ready to ship this month
mag.categoriesTitle: Which path fits how you play?
mag.lifestyleBody: Auditions and slow sessions happen outside the showroom too. These moments are how we think about shipping stability and the voice you bring home.
mag.lifestyleAltField: Player standing in a green rice field holding a handpan beneath an overcast sky
mag.lifestyleAltPlaying: Player seated outdoors with eyes closed, hands on a bronze handpan in a tropical garden
mag.warrantyBody: We document how each build leaves the bench and how it should settle in your space. If travel or humidity shifts the profile, you get clear guidance and a path to correction—not radio silence.
